about_text_first: Hello my name is Szymon I deal with the development of web applications. My adventure with programming began in 2018 in technical school majoring in computer science currently studying and developing my skills in this area. After school I create applications in the organization
about_text_second: with a group of friends. I am also interested in personal development and improving soft skills, and in my spare time I enjoy reading books or playing sports.
